Strategy Update · 02.06.25

Supply & Demand Weekly Setup Guide

Linked from your uploaded strategy update. Use this as the quick execution checklist before using the full flowchart below.

4H / 8H / Daily range25% or 75% priority50% only with trendBelow A+ = delete7 / 10 A+ minimum
1. Mark the rangeIdentify the most recent high and low on 4H and above. Mark the higher-timeframe Daily trend and the recent 4H trend.
Page 1 · Recent high / low plus Daily and 4H trend context.
2. Find BOS + zonesSpot the recent break of structure, then mark fresh supply/demand blocks where price may re-enter.
Page 2 · BOS and chosen zones / blocks.
3. Prioritise locationZones in the 25% or 75% region have higher probability, especially when aligned with both current and Daily trend.
